---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do that's difficult or impossible today?

## Proposed solution

What change would solve it? Try to describe behaviour, not
implementation — that helps the discussion stay focused on the
outcome.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you think about? Why are they worse?

## Additional context

Related links, prior art, or anything else that adds context.
